scope: House of Wu WordPress REST API (dress post type), one catalog row per (style, color).
notes: Discovery + detail come from /wp-json/wp/v2/dress; no HTML scrape.
Colors merge the ACF color_images field (name + hex) with the dress_color taxonomy; images are grouped to a color by the color token in each filename.
color_hex, attributes, and description_html ride along unused by the current importer.
Public codes are null because the app mints them on import.
Pricing and per-size availability are intentionally skipped.
